findings.evidence: `rg -n "^(def|abbrev|theorem|instance)|top|bottom|⊤|⊥" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Subcomodule.lean` shows no top/bottom declarations; lines 13-16 make the claim.
findings.fix: Either add documented `⊤`/`⊥` subcomodule definitions, or remove the top/bottom claim from the module docstring.
findings.issue: The module docstring says the file supplies “the top and bottom subcomodules”, but the file defines only `submoduleCoactionRange`, `IsSubcomodule`, `Subcomodule`, constructors/accessors, and membership/stability lemmas.

summary: The new file has documentation, but its module docstring overclaims the API that the file actually provides.
